description: One-paragraph summary: ticket ID, goal, parent epic, Jira link, affected packages/paths, verification approach (e.g. RTL vs browser), and pointers to coding standards (monorepo guide, .cursorrules).

userStories.title: Short imperative title (what ships)
userStories.description: As a <role>, I need <capability> so that <outcome>.
acceptanceCriteria: Another criterion (include "npm test passes" / "Typecheck passes" / "Prettier" where relevant)
Architecture constraints if they apply (handlers vs middleware, DAL rules, etc.)
userStories.notes: Optional: implementation hints, edge cases, links to mocks or schemas.

userStories.title: Dependent story title
userStories.description: As a developer, I need types and UI aligned with US-001 so the feature is end-to-end consistent.
acceptanceCriteria: Depends on prior story: list fields, types, or UI behaviors
data-testid or RTL expectations when UI is involved
